title: tephrosia ferruginea
intro: Tephrosia ferruginea, also known as the Yellow Leaf or Copper-leaf, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family. It is a medicinal plant with properties that have been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of Tephrosia ferruginea include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
